evals.prompt: I need an n8n workflow that automatically sends invoice reminders. It should check every morning at 08:00 for overdue rechnungen in Supabase, and for each one that's more than 7 days past the zahlungsziel, send a reminder email to the customer via the send-email edge function. Log everything to automation_log. Export as JSON for config/n8n-workflows/.
evals.expected_output: A complete n8n workflow JSON file with: scheduleTrigger at 08:00 Europe/Berlin, Supabase getAll on rechnungen with status=eq.offen filter, a Set or Code node to calculate days overdue from created_at + zahlungsziel_tage, an IF node checking days_overdue > 7, an HTTP Request node calling the send-email edge function with proper Authorization and apikey headers, an INSERT to automation_log with action='reminder.sent', an error handler node logging to automation_log with action='reminder.error', and continueOnFail on the email node. All nodes should have descriptive names and notes.

assertions.text: Workflow uses scheduleTrigger with cron expression and Europe/Berlin timezone
Supabase getAll node queries rechnungen table with status filter
Days overdue calculation uses created_at and zahlungsziel_tage fields
Email sent via Supabase send-email edge function with Authorization and apikey headers
automation_log INSERT node present with action field
continueOnFail set to true on external API call nodes
Error handler node logs errors to automation_log
Valid JSON that could be imported into n8n (has nodes, connections, settings keys)

evals.prompt: Design an n8n workflow that processes inbound emails and creates Anfragen in Supabase. It should receive a webhook POST with sender_email, sender_name, subject, and body fields. Use Ollama (mistral-small on the VPS) to classify the intent and extract the service type (leistungsart). Then create an anfragen record in Supabase and send a confirmation email back to the sender. Return a proper webhook response. Save to config/n8n-workflows/workflow-email-intake.json.
evals.expected_output: A complete n8n workflow JSON with: webhook trigger on POST with responseMode responseNode, input validation IF node checking required fields, HTTP Request to Ollama at http://172.19.0.1:11434/api/chat with mistral-small model for intent classification, a Set node extracting the classified fields from Ollama response, Supabase create on anfragen table with kunde_name/kunde_email/leistungsart/beschreibung/status='neu', HTTP Request to send-email edge function for confirmation, automation_log INSERT, respondToWebhook nodes for success (200) and error (400) paths, and an error handler.

assertions.text: Webhook trigger with POST method and responseMode set to responseNode
Input validation checks for required fields (sender_email, sender_name)
Ollama HTTP Request to http://172.19.0.1:11434/api/chat or uses OLLAMA_BASE_URL env var
Model specified as mistral-small or uses OLLAMA_MODEL env var
Supabase create on anfragen table with leistungsart and status fields
respondToWebhook nodes present for both success and error responses
Confirmation email sent via send-email edge function
Valid n8n workflow JSON structure with nodes, connections, and settings

evals.prompt: Create a weekly reporting workflow for FreyAI that runs every Monday at 09:00 and sends a summary via Telegram. It should query Supabase for: count of new anfragen this week, count of rechnungen created this week, total brutto of rechnungen with status='bezahlt' this week, and count of active auftraege. Use a Code node to aggregate the data, then Ollama to generate a natural language summary in German, and send it to Telegram. Log to automation_log.
evals.expected_output: A complete n8n workflow JSON with: scheduleTrigger with cron '0 9 * * 1' and Europe/Berlin timezone, multiple Supabase getAll queries (anfragen, rechnungen, auftraege) with date filters for current week, a Code node aggregating counts and totals, HTTP Request to Ollama for German language summary generation, HTTP Request to Telegram Bot API sendMessage with HTML parse_mode, automation_log INSERT, error handler, and continueOnFail on all external calls.

assertions.text: Schedule trigger with Monday cron expression (day-of-week = 1) and Europe/Berlin timezone
Multiple Supabase queries for anfragen, rechnungen, and auftraege tables
Code node that aggregates data (counts, totals) from the Supabase queries
Ollama call for generating German natural language summary
Telegram sendMessage via HTTP Request with TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_CTO_CHAT_ID
automation_log INSERT with descriptive action name
continueOnFail on Ollama and Telegram nodes
Valid n8n workflow JSON structure
